notableEvents.label: Adam Frazier GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Adam Frazier grounds into a double play, first baseman Munetaka Murakami to shortstop Colson Montgomery. Travis d'Arnaud out at 2nd. Adam Frazier out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Oswald Peraza pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Oswald Peraza pops out to first baseman Munetaka Murakami in foul territory.

notableEvents.label: Randal Grichuk pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Randal Grichuk lines out to third baseman Yoán Moncada.

notableEvents.label: 2 straight HRs
notableEvents.detail: Back-to-back (or more) homers in one game
